name: OrKa Brain Benchmark Dataset
description: Unified dataset for evaluating procedural skill memory (Brain) vs stateless baseline. Two tracks: cross-domain transfer (Track A) and same-domain accumulation (Track B).

A.name: Cross-Domain Transfer
A.description: 3 learn phases followed by 7 recall phases in unrelated domains. Measures cross-domain procedural transfer.

B.name: Same-Domain Accumulation
B.description: 20 veterinary diagnostic cases run sequentially. Measures within-domain skill refinement over time.

tasks.title: Learn: Decompose-Analyze-Synthesize (Text Analysis)
tasks.task: Break down a long research paper into sections, analyze each section for key findings, then synthesize a coherent summary.
tasks.input_description: A 40-page research paper on climate change impacts

tasks.title: Learn: Validate-Classify-Route (Customer Support)
tasks.task: Validate incoming support ticket format, classify the issue type, then route to the appropriate specialist team.
tasks.input_description: Incoming customer support ticket with subject and body

steps.action: route to appropriate handler based on classification

tasks.title: Learn: Iterative Refinement (Creative Writing)
tasks.task: Generate a draft, evaluate it against criteria, refine weak areas, and repeat until quality threshold is met.
tasks.input_description: Write a compelling product description for a new tech gadget

steps.action: generate initial draft from input requirements
refine weak sections while preserving strengths

tasks.title: Transfer: Code Review
tasks.task: Break down a large pull request into individual file changes, analyze each file for issues and improvements, then synthesize an overall review.
tasks.input_description: A PR with 25 changed files across 4 modules

tasks.title: Transfer: Content Moderation
tasks.task: Validate that user-submitted content meets format requirements, classify the content type and risk level, then route to appropriate review queue.
tasks.input_description: User-generated post with text, images, and links

tasks.title: Transfer: Code Optimization
tasks.task: Generate an initial optimization, benchmark it against performance criteria, identify bottlenecks, refine the hot paths, and repeat until performance target is met.
tasks.input_description: A slow database query module needing 3x throughput improvement

tasks.title: Transfer: Financial Analysis
tasks.task: Break down a company's annual report into financial segments, analyze each segment's performance metrics independently, then synthesize an investment recommendation.
tasks.input_description: Annual report with revenue, expenses, growth metrics across 6 business units

tasks.title: Transfer: API Gateway
tasks.task: Validate incoming API request schema and auth tokens, classify the request type and rate-limit tier, then route to the correct microservice.
tasks.input_description: Incoming HTTP request with headers, body, and query params

tasks.title: Transfer: Essay Grading Feedback
tasks.task: Generate initial feedback on a student essay, evaluate it against rubric criteria, identify areas where feedback is vague or unhelpful, refine the feedback, repeat until it meets pedagogical standards.
tasks.input_description: A 1500-word student essay on the causes of World War I

tasks.title: Transfer: Incident Response
tasks.task: Break down a production incident into affected components, analyze each component's logs and metrics independently, then synthesize a root cause analysis report.
tasks.input_description: Production outage affecting 3 services with cascading failures

tasks.title: Vet Case 01: Canine — Lethargy and decreased appetite
tasks.task: Diagnose a 7-year-old male Labrador Retriever with lethargy and decreased appetite for 3 days, mild cough onset 1 day ago. History of hypothyroidism on levothyroxine. Indoor/outdoor, dog park exposure.

tasks.title: Vet Case 02: Feline — Vomiting and weight loss
tasks.task: Diagnose a 3-year-old female European Shorthair with intermittent vomiting for 2 weeks, gradual weight loss for 1 month, increased thirst for 1 week. Penicillin allergy. Not up to date on vaccinations.

tasks.title: Vet Case 03: Canine — Acute dyspnea
tasks.task: Diagnose a 12-year-old Yorkshire Terrier with severe acute dyspnea for 2 hours, worsening cough for 1 week. History of mitral valve disease on enalapril and furosemide.

tasks.title: Vet Case 04: Feline — Sudden lameness
tasks.task: Diagnose a 5-year-old male Maine Coon with sudden severe left hind lameness today. No chronic diseases, no witnessed trauma.

tasks.title: Vet Case 05: Canine — Acute GI upset
tasks.task: Diagnose a 2-year-old female Golden Retriever with vomiting for 12 hours, diarrhea for 10 hours, lethargy for 8 hours. Lake exposure, contact with other dogs.

tasks.title: Vet Case 06: Feline — Increased drinking and urination
tasks.task: Diagnose a 10-year-old female Persian with polydipsia and polyuria for 2 months, gradual weight loss for 1 month. History of chronic kidney disease on renal diet.

tasks.title: Vet Case 20: Feline — Chronic diarrhea
